title: Matter-antimatter asymmetry (baryogenesis)
statement: The observed baryon-to-photon ratio $\eta_B\simeq 6\times10^{-10}$ is generated by the TECT phase-transition dynamics satisfying the three Sakharov conditions (B-violation, C/CP-violation, departure from equilibrium).
scope: OPEN scaffold. Baryogenesis mechanism and magnitude (pillar P11; GAP-4). Uses the CP structure (D4) and the transition history (F1).
falsifier: The TECT transition violating a Sakharov condition, or predicting $\eta_B$ of the wrong sign or magnitude after input freeze (GAP-4).
no_overclaim: No baryogenesis mechanism is established; the Sakharov-condition realisation is the target.
next_action: Identify the CP-violating source and the out-of-equilibrium step in the Brazovskii transition; estimate $\eta_B$.
